_comment: Opt-in architecture + structure fitness rules for the grm-architecture-audit skill. Copy to .claude/architecture-rules.json and adapt to this project. Absent file => architecture-audit exits clean but emits a visible WARN pointing at the per-family starter rulesets (.claude/quick-start-templates/{service,web,gui,lib}/files/.claude/architecture-rules.json) — never silent (#314). To decline enforcement explicitly, commit {"schema-version": 1, "opt_out": true, "opt_out-reason": "..."} as the rules file. The 'structure' block encodes the standard project layout — full contract: docs/project-structure.md. Design: the architecture-fitness-design.md and file-structure-standard-design.md framework specs — they live only in the upstream Grimoire repository, not in this project's own docs/
